message:
fix(dcg): remove unused import and fix flaky test

- Remove unused `sql` import from dcg-pending.service.ts
- Fix flaky cleanupExpiredExceptions test by waiting >1 second
  (timestamps are stored in seconds, so 100ms was insufficient)
- Add explicit verification that specific exception was marked expired

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
